features.label: Multi-Tab Browser
features.desc: Full tab management — drag-drop reorder, tab sleep, thumbnail hover previews, per-tab mute, lazy loading.
features.howto: Ctrl+T new · Ctrl+W close · Ctrl+Tab switch

features.label: Smart Omnibox
features.desc: Address bar with real-time search suggestions, smart URL vs search detection, 5 search engines.

features.label: Find in Page
features.desc: Full-text search within any webpage. Shows match count, highlights all matches.

features.label: Incognito Mode
features.desc: Separate purple-themed private window with fully isolated session partition.

features.label: Command Palette
features.desc: Fuzzy-search launcher for all browser actions.

features.label: Bookmarks & History
features.desc: Full bookmark manager with favicon, search and bookmarks bar.

features.label: Download Manager
features.desc: Real-time download tracking with speed, progress bar, open file/folder buttons.

features.label: Quick Launch Panel
features.desc: Spotlight-style launcher with bookmarks grid and 50+ popular sites.

features.label: AI Page Summarizer
features.desc: Summarize any webpage. 4 providers: HuggingFace, OpenAI, Ollama, Extractive.

features.label: Page Translator
features.desc: Auto-detects page language and shows translation bar.

features.label: Picture-in-Picture Manager
features.desc: Auto-triggers PiP when switching away from a tab with playing video.

features.label: Screenshot Tool
features.desc: Capture visible viewport or full page. Saves PNG via system dialog.

features.label: WhatsApp Panel
features.desc: Persistent WhatsApp Web sidebar using dedicated session partition.

features.label: GitHub-based Updater
features.desc: Browse last 30 commits from GitHub API, apply any commit without reinstalling.

features.label: DNS Prefetch & Link Prefetch
features.desc: Pre-warms DNS for top sites on startup. Prefetches link hints in background.
